Suspected security vulnerabilities must not be posted in public issues. Use the private reporting path in SECURITY.md or the repository Security tab.

## Page Or Area

Which doc page or README section needs work?

## Problem

What is missing, stale, or unclear?

## Suggested Fix

What should the docs say instead?
